taxonomy: Neomammillaria mainiae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the cactus family, Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Neomammillaria, which is a group of cacti that are native to Mexico. Neomammillaria mainiae is further classified as a member of the tribe Cacteae within the subfamily Cactoideae. The plant is a type of small to medium-sized cactus, characterized by its small flowers and rounded stems. Neomammillaria mainiae is closely related to other cacti species within the same genus.
